stories.title: Initialize Go module and Bookmark model with SQLite persistence
acceptance_criteria: go.mod exists with module name 'bookmarks-api'
bookmark.go defines Bookmark struct: ID int64, URL string, Title string, Tags []string, CreatedAt time.Time
store.go defines BookmarkStore with SQLite via database/sql + modernc.org/sqlite
NewStore(dbPath) creates table if not exists and returns *BookmarkStore
go build ./... succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Bookmark CRUD operations with tag filtering
acceptance_criteria: Create(url, title, tags) inserts bookmark and returns it with non-zero ID and CreatedAt
GetByID(id) returns the bookmark or ErrNotFound
List() returns all bookmarks ordered by CreatedAt descending
ListByTag(tag) returns only bookmarks containing that tag
Delete(id) removes the bookmark; subsequent GetByID returns ErrNotFound
Update(id, url, title, tags) modifies an existing bookmark

stories.title: REST API endpoints with JSON responses
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/bookmarks returns 200 with JSON array of all bookmarks
GET /api/bookmarks?tag=golang filters by tag
POST /api/bookmarks with JSON body {url, title, tags} returns 201 with created bookmark
GET /api/bookmarks/{id} returns 200 with single bookmark or 404
PUT /api/bookmarks/{id} with JSON body updates and returns 200
DELETE /api/bookmarks/{id} returns 204 on success or 404 if not found
POST /api/bookmarks with missing url returns 400 with error message

stories.title: Search and pagination
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/bookmarks?q=keyword searches URL and title fields (case-insensitive)
GET /api/bookmarks?page=2&per_page=10 returns paginated results
Response includes X-Total-Count header with total matching bookmarks
Default per_page is 20, max is 100
Combining ?q=keyword&tag=golang applies both filters
Empty result returns 200 with empty array, not 404
